description: Set up the monorepo project structure with backend (Express + Prisma + SQLite) and frontend (Next.js), including database schema for Appointment, AppointmentTransaction, AuditLog, Terminal, User, TruckingCompany, and SCAC tables. Seed reference data for terminals and a test trucking company.
steps: Create the monorepo root with a top-level package.json that has scripts to run both backend and frontend

Create backend/ directory with package.json including dependencies: express, @prisma/client, prisma, typescript, ts-node, cors, uuid, zod for validation. Dev deps: jest, ts-jest, @types/express, @types/node, @types/cors, supertest, @types/supertest
Create backend/tsconfig.json with strict TypeScript configuration targeting ES2022/NodeNext

Create backend/prisma/schema.prisma with SQLite provider and models: Terminal (terminalId, code, name, timezone, status, address, createdAt, updatedAt), User (userId, username, email, phone, userType, status, createdAt, updatedAt), TruckingCompany (truckingCompanyId, name, status, primaryContact, createdAt, updatedAt), Scac (scacCode as id, truckingCompanyId FK, status), Appointment (appointmentId, appointmentNumber unique, terminalId FK, truckingCompanyId FK, scacCode, transactionType, appointmentStatus, slotId, requestedStartTime, requestedEndTime, gateCode nullable, isDualAppointment default false, source, createdBy, createdAt, updatedBy, updatedAt, cancellationReason nullable, cancellationTimestamp nullable, noShowFlag default false, checkInTimestamp nullable, gateCompleteTimestamp nullable), AppointmentTransaction (transactionId, appointmentId FK, transactionType, referenceType, referenceNumber, containerNumber nullable, bookingNumber nullable, groupCode nullable, edoNumber nullable, chassisNumber nullable, sealNumbers nullable, equipmentType nullable, lineOperator nullable, validationStatus), AuditLog (auditLogId, entityType, entityId, action, actorUserId, source, beforeValue nullable as JSON string, afterValue nullable as JSON string, reason nullable, timestamp)
Create backend/prisma/seed.ts that seeds: 2 terminals (TRAPAC-LA, TRAPAC-OAK), 1 trucking company (Test Trucking Co), 1 SCAC (TTCO), 1 test user (dispatcher role)
Create backend/src/index.ts as Express app entry point with CORS, JSON body parsing, and route mounting

Create backend/src/types/index.ts with TypeScript enums and types: TransactionType (PICK_CHASSIS, PICK_DRAY, PICK_IMPORT, PICK_EMPTY, DROP_CHASSIS, DROP_DRAY, DROP_EXPORT, DROP_EMPTY, TWIN_EMPTY, DUAL), AppointmentStatus (DRAFT, PENDING, CONFIRMED, CHECKED_IN, COMPLETED, CANCELLED, NO_SHOW), and request/response DTOs

Create frontend/ directory with Next.js 14 app router setup: package.json with next, react, react-dom, typescript, tailwindcss, @types/react, @types/node, jest, @testing-library/react, @testing-library/jest-dom
Create frontend/src/app/layout.tsx with basic layout and navigation stub
Create frontend/src/app/page.tsx as home page with link to appointments
Create frontend/src/lib/api.ts as API client module with base URL configuration pointing to http://localhost:3001/api
Add backend jest.config.ts configured for ts-jest with moduleNameMapper
Add frontend jest.config.ts configured for next/jest with jsdom test environment
Run npm install in backend/ and frontend/ to verify dependencies resolve
Run npx prisma generate and npx prisma db push in backend/ to create SQLite database
Run npx prisma db seed in backend/ to populate reference data
Run npm run build in backend/ to verify TypeScript compilation
acceptance_criteria: backend/prisma/schema.prisma contains all required models with correct fields and relationships
Running 'npx prisma generate' in backend/ succeeds without errors
Running 'npx prisma db push' in backend/ creates the SQLite database file
Running 'npx prisma db seed' in backend/ populates terminal and test data
backend/src/index.ts starts an Express server on port 3001
frontend/ contains a working Next.js setup that compiles with 'npm run build'
TypeScript types in backend/src/types/index.ts cover all transaction types and appointment statuses from the design doc
verification: cd /projects/sandbox/kiro-test-trapac/backend && npm install && npx prisma generate && npx prisma db push && npm run build
cd /projects/sandbox/kiro-test-trapac/frontend && npm install && npm run build
